policy: Every entry below is FROZEN as of freeze_date, before the next decisive data releases (JUNO theta12/theta13, CMB-S4/LiteBIRD r and beta, DESI n_s). The decimals are recomputed from the two axioms by v84_frozen_registry.py on every suite run; any later change of a formula or a value breaks the suite and is visible in manifest.sha256 / git history. Entries are dimensionless (the dimensionless axis is the only axis on which TFPT claims closure). Layer tags follow the document markers: core = [N] numerical fixed point of the closed compiler; conditional = [N]/[P] (named hypothesis stated in conditional_on); assigned = texture/phase-lattice assignment, not a derivation.

predictions.formula: 1/root of F_U1(alpha) = alpha^3 - 2 c3^3 alpha^2 - (4/5) c3^6 * 41 * log(1/phi_seam(alpha)) = 0
predictions.conditional_on: Ward-origin reading of F_U1 is [P]; the root itself is unconditional given the equation
predictions.kill_criterion: persistent deviation beyond combined theory+measurement error

predictions.observable: solar mixing angle sin^2(theta_12) -- PREDICTION OF RECORD
predictions.kill_criterion: JUNO value away from 0.306747 beyond 3 sigma kills the seam-misalignment reading

predictions.experiment: JUNO / global fits (NuFIT 6.0: 0.02195 +- 0.00058, currently ~2 sigma tension)
predictions.kill_criterion: persistent deviation beyond 3 sigma after global fit

predictions.conditional_on: CMB EB/TB rotation = the same boundary phase as the flavor seed [P]
predictions.kill_criterion: systematics-controlled exclusion of 0.2424 deg at > 3 sigma (incl. precise zero or wrong sign)

predictions.observable: CKM CP phase delta (radians, leading order)
predictions.conditional_on: leading-order holonomy readout [P]; sub-leading corrections not closed
predictions.kill_criterion: leading-order reading fails if precise delta departs from pi/3 + 3 lambda_C^2 beyond the stated sub-leading budget
scheme-consistent comparison departing beyond stated transport corrections
scheme-consistent comparison departing beyond stated transport corrections

predictions.conditional_on: integer Plucker readout on the derived selector stratum (v49/v71)
integer Plucker readout on the derived selector stratum (v49/v71)
integer Plucker readout on the derived selector stratum (v49/v71)

predictions.kill_criterion: r > 0.01 robustly kills the R^2 branch

predictions.conditional_on: physical Lambda branch selection (8pi)^2 delta_top = 3/(4pi^2) [A]; alpha^-1 <-> Lambda identification [P]
predictions.kill_criterion: robust w != -1, or absolute scale off after anchoring

assigned_texture_values.kill_criterion: precise value incompatible with the branch
strongly non-maximal with no matching breaking structure

conditional_bands.formula: 12 / N_star^2, N_star in [50, 60] (external reheating input, NOT a compiler output)
conditional_bands.kill_criterion: r > 0.01 robustly kills the R^2 branch

conditional_bands.formula: 1 - 2/N_star, N_star in [50, 60] (external reheating input, NOT a compiler output)
conditional_bands.experiment: Planck / DESI (current ~2 sigma tension with DESI-combined)
conditional_bands.kill_criterion: value robustly outside the Starobinsky window at fixed reheating

derived_variants_not_predictions.note: leading-epsilon variant (epsilon = c3); a truncation of the SAME texture, NOT an alternative prediction

derived_variants_not_predictions.formula: full non-linear TBM + epsilon=(3/4)phi0 rotation, sin^2 = |U_e2|^2/(1-|U_e3|^2)
derived_variants_not_predictions.note: non-linearised variant of the SAME texture, NOT an alternative prediction; cf. v9_neutrino_texture.py
